Hero.title: Secure Your Children's Future in Portugal
Hero.subtitle: Raising Kids in Portugal is the independent guide for international families relocating to Portugal. We compare every leading international school near Lisbon — IB, British, and American curricula at St. Julian's, TASIS Portugal, CAISL, and United Lisbon — map family-friendly neighborhoods in Cascais, Sintra, and Parque das Nações, and guide you through D7, D8, and Golden Visa options. Built on extensive relocation research and data synthesis: the structured, honest research you need before you commit.

Pillars.introHeading: Three decisions that define your family's move to Portugal
Pillars.introBody: Which international school near Lisbon — IB, British, or American. Which neighborhood in Cascais, Sintra, or Parque das Nações. And how to navigate visas, housing, and timelines without costly mistakes. Each guide below is independent, built on data from 200+ families who made this move.
Pillars.educationDesc: Compare IB, British, and American curriculums with unbiased performance data.
Pillars.livingDesc: Find family-safe neighborhoods with optimized commutes to your chosen school.
Pillars.softLandingDesc: A complete integration system to help your children thrive from Day 1.
Pillars.softLandingTeaser: From the right visa to the right school and the right neighborhood — a complete guide to moving your family to Portugal. Built on extensive research and independent data analysis.

AboutPage.metaTitle: About Raising Kids in Portugal — Independent School & Relocation Intelligence for Portugal
AboutPage.metaDescription: Raising Kids in Portugal is an independent platform helping affluent international families relocate to Portugal with confidence. We verify schools, neighborhoods, and relocation data — with no paid placements and no conflicts of interest.
AboutPage.h1: The trusted guide for families relocating to Portugal
AboutPage.opening: Raising Kids in Portugal was built on a single premise: relocating families deserve verified, unbiased information — not sponsored content dressed up as advice. We provide independent school and neighborhood intelligence so you can make one of the most important decisions for your children with confidence.
AboutPage.whatWeDoH2: What Raising Kids in Portugal does
AboutPage.whatWeDo1: We research and analyze the top international schools and expat-friendly neighborhoods in Portugal — then publish that information for free. Our coverage currently focuses on the greater Lisbon area, where the concentration of international schools and expat infrastructure is the highest in the country.
AboutPage.whatWeDo2: For each school, we publish fee breakdowns, curriculum comparisons, and data-driven insights. For each neighborhood, we map commute times to relevant schools, describe the expat community, and assess family lifestyle fit.
AboutPage.whatWeDo3: We also provide a free School Finder quiz that matches families to the right school and neighborhood in under 60 seconds — based on budget, lifestyle preference, curriculum, and move timeline.
AboutPage.principle1Body: Raising Kids in Portugal accepts no payments, commissions, or referral fees from schools, real estate agencies, or relocation firms. Every assessment is fully self-funded. This is the only way our data can be trusted.
AboutPage.principle2Body: We aggregate and verify published fees, curricula, and official data points. If we can't find reliable data, we don't publish it.
AboutPage.principle3Body: We don't call ourselves experts because we have a website. We earn credibility through specificity — acceptance rate data, real commute times, actual all-in fee breakdowns, and the things schools don't advertise.
AboutPage.principle4Body: We collect structured intent data to improve our recommendations. We do not sell raw user data to third parties. If we ever introduce paid partnerships, they will be disclosed explicitly and separately from our editorial content.
AboutPage.whoWeServeH2: Who uses Raising Kids in Portugal
AboutPage.whoWeServe1: Our primary audience is affluent international families — typically from the UK, USA, Germany, France, the Netherlands, and the UAE — who are considering relocating to Portugal and want to make school and neighborhood decisions based on verified data, not marketing.
AboutPage.whoWeServe2: These are families for whom school quality is the primary filter for where to live, and who are prepared to invest significantly in their children's education. They are experienced enough to be skeptical of generic relocation advice — and demanding enough to expect specificity, honesty, and independence.
AboutPage.whatWeDoNotH2: What Raising Kids in Portugal does not do
AboutPage.doNot1: We do not accept payment from schools, agencies, or any third party in exchange for editorial coverage.
AboutPage.doNot2: We do not rank schools based on advertising spend or partnership agreements.
AboutPage.doNot3: We do not sell raw user data to schools, real estate agencies, or marketing platforms.
AboutPage.doNot4: We do not guarantee school admission — all acceptance rates are historical averages.
AboutPage.doNot5: We do not provide legal or visa advice — always consult a licensed immigration lawyer.
AboutPage.ctaText: Start with our School Finder quiz or browse the full school comparison.

SchoolFinderPage.metaTitle: School Finder — Find Your Perfect International School in Portugal | Raising Kids in Portugal
SchoolFinderPage.metaDescription: Answer 4 questions and get matched with the right international school and neighborhood in Portugal. Free, unbiased, based on your budget, curriculum preference, and lifestyle.
SchoolFinderPage.h1: Find Your Perfect School in Portugal
SchoolFinderPage.subtitle: Answer 4 questions about your budget, lifestyle, curriculum preference, and timeline. We match you with the right school and the right neighborhood — together.
SchoolFinderPage.step1Desc: Annual school fees from €12,000 to €32,000+ — we match you to realistic options.
SchoolFinderPage.step2Desc: Coastal, city, or nature — Portugal has the right neighborhood for each family.
SchoolFinderPage.step3Desc: British IGCSE, American AP, or IB Diploma — we explain the difference clearly.
SchoolFinderPage.step4Desc: Moving in 3 months or just exploring — we calibrate the urgency of your results.
SchoolFinderPage.ctaSubtext: No sign-up required to see your results
SchoolFinderPage.faq1q: How accurate are the school matches?
SchoolFinderPage.faq1a: Our matching logic is based on 4 weighted criteria: budget, lifestyle, curriculum, and move timeline. The results surface the 2 most compatible schools from our vetted list of 4 top international schools near Lisbon. You should always visit in person before committing.
SchoolFinderPage.faq2q: What if none of the schools feel right?
SchoolFinderPage.faq2a: The quiz shows the best fit from our current list. For a deeper, personalised review — including schools outside our current database — contact us directly. We're adding more schools in 2026.
SchoolFinderPage.faq3q: Is Raising Kids in Portugal paid by the schools?
SchoolFinderPage.faq3a: No. Raising Kids in Portugal accepts no payments, commissions, or referral fees from schools. Our assessments are fully independent. This is non-negotiable for us.
